00 00 00 00 02 00 FF FF 01 00 05 00 43 5A 6F 6E 65 B3 D1 39 3F C5 71 BC 3F CB C0 01 2D 5D C1 96 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 3D 0D 18 24 7D C2 3F 98 50 C1 E1 05 11 B1 3F 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 00 10
